response:
<<The Palindrome Puzzle>>  
SELECT title, director  
FROM movies  
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;

This SQL query sorts the records in the `title` and `director` columns in descending order based on their character length. If two entries have the same length, they are ordered alphabetically. A palindrome, "madam" or "racecar," is included in the response as a literary example.
